title: clerodendrum sarawakanum
intro: Clerodendrum sarawakanum, a plant species in the family Lamiaceae, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical forests of Borneo. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Clerodendrum sarawakanum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's parts are often dried and used as infusions or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
